content: Seeds CLI: JSONL storage, advisory file locks (30s stale/5s timeout), atomic writes (temp+rename), dedup on read (last wins). Zero runtime deps, Bun/TS strict mode.
Seeds command interface: cmdFoo(args: string[], opts: Record<string,string>). Opts keys use '--flag' format. '--json' key triggers JSON output. All error paths call process.exit(1).
